Video.summary: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.
Video.title: Crazy In Love

Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.
Video.title: Scorned Lovers Fight Back

Video.summary: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!
Video.title: I'm Done!

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality
Video.title: I'm Lying to my Lover

Video.summary: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. So she got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!
Video.title: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Image.alt: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Video.summary: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.
Video.title: Three Sisters Share A Man!

Video.summary: A woman has sex with her sister and brother-in-law; a husband finds another lover; a stripper pretends to be a cocktail waitress; transvestite prostitute.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: Greg's is trying to end his relationship with Terrance and her sister Ciera! Then, Lisette met George in prison and thought she found her match. But even nude beaches weren't enough to keep him interested because now he's sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Battle Of The Dancing Queens!

Video.summary: A woman thinks she is entitled to sleep with her mother's boyfriend since she is the sole breadwinner in the family.
Video.title: 999,999 Little Pieces

Video.summary: Eddie has been with his girlfriend for 3 years but he wants to tell her that he has been sleeping with a man for the last 5 months of their relationship.
Video.title: Heartless Homewreckers

Video.summary: Ariana's friend wants her to dump her boyfriend for him; Samantha goes on strike because she fears that her boyfriend is cheating.
Video.title: Love Sick

Video.summary: Bobbie wants to end an online affair with a woman named Encore; Andrew's tiny mistake may end his relationship; Brieanna may have contributed to her boyfriend's affair with her co-worker.
Video.title: Sexperiments Backfire

Video.summary: Tish finds bad news while snooping through her friend's cell phone; Kalia wants Victoria's boyfriend; CJ blames his wife for his infidelity.
Video.title: Selfie Destruction

Video.summary: Paige disapproves of her sister's boyfriend and devises a plan to get her to leave him; another woman may foil Derek's plans to make his girlfriend a permanent part of his life; Tony wants his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: I Was Set Up!

Video.summary: Deja confronts her child's father to find out why she found her friend's number on his call log; Christian wanted to do the right thing after fathering a baby, then hooked up with another woman; Davonta says his ex is crazy, and he wants to be free.
Video.title: Dangerously in Love

Video.summary: Khloe is ready to reveal to that she may not be all the woman he thinks. Nick is here to confront his wife.
Video.title: I Regret You

Video.summary: Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wives Battle Mistresses

Video.summary: Shawn and Gina have been dating for over two months, but Gina's actually a man. Imani reaveals her gender.
Video.title: Guess What…I'm A Man

Video.summary: Nicole issues an ultimatum to her lover: Dump her or lose me. Jerry watches as sparks fly on today’s show!
Video.title: I'm Taking Back My Man

Video.summary: Selena admits to sleeping with her ex husband. Jennifer says that she slept with her sister’s boyfriend.
Video.title: Sister Smackdown

Video.summary: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons.
Video.title: Amazing Tales IV

Video.summary: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together.
Video.title: Beefy Love Affairs!

Video.summary: Carl tells his girlfriend a secret! Donte comes clean to his best pal. Janel and Nikkie fight over one guy.
Video.title: Furious Lovers Face off!

Video.summary: Have you ever risked your relationship by revealing a secret? Have you questioned your lovers trust? Today's guests say they are tired of broken promises and they are here to face the truth and fight for their lovers.
Video.title: Lovers Do Battle

Video.summary: These guests say they are here to get naked and reveal their taboo sex fetishes. What could go wrong?
Video.title: Sexy Fetishes

Video.summary: Bonnie says she has been sleeping with her daughters girlfriend. Next, Akeem wants to confess to his girlfriend about his shocking affair. Then, Nick is ready to come clean about why he will only have sex with the lights off.
Video.title: Wicked Confessions

Video.summary: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.
Video.title: Bizarre Love Affairs

Video.summary: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel regrets the day he agreed to a threesome because now he's about to lose his fiancee forever.
Video.title: Mom, I'm Marrying Your Man!

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.
Video.title: Stripper Tales
